title: Elevator Blocks
description: Simple elevator blocks for Fabric. Jump to go up, crouch to go down, and link floors with 16 color-coded elevator variants.
body:
# Elevator Plus

Fast, simple vertical transport without redstone contraptions.

Elevator Plus adds craftable elevator blocks that let you move instantly between floors. Place matching elevators above or below each other, jump to go up, and crouch to go down.

## Features
- Jump on an elevator to go **up**
- Crouch on an elevator to go **down**
- **16 dyeable color variants** for separate elevator networks
- Simple crafting and intuitive use
- Built-in safety check for destination space
- Teleport sound and particle effects for feedback

## Why use it
- Clean vertical travel in bases and towers
- Better movement in multiplayer hubs
- Easy floor separation with color variants
- Faster and cleaner than ladders or bubble columns

## How it works
- Place matching elevator blocks in a vertical line
- Use the same color to connect the floors you want
- Jump to travel upward
- Crouch to travel downward

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
